sections.sectionTitle: Leilu lam gam Kumpite a Kizawhna

verses.text: Hazor kumpipa Jabin in Israel-te' gualzawhna thu a zak ciangin amah in Madon kumpipa Jobab leh Shimron kumpipa, Akshaf kumpipa
saklam mualtung leh Khinneroth leitaw lama om Arabah gamsung, leh Jordan gunkuam leh nitumna lamah Nafathdor gamsunga om kumpite
nisuahna leh nitumna lama om Kanaan mite, Amor mite, Hit mite, Perez mite, leh mualtung gama om Jebus mite, leh Mizpah gam Hermon nuai-a Hiv mite tungah thu a puak hi
Tua ciangin amaute tampi a pha a galkap honpite tawh, a tam mahmah sakolte leh leengte tawh, tuipi gei-a om sehnel bangin tampi tak hong kuankhia uh hi
Hih kumpite khempeuh in amau' galkapte gawmin Israel mite tawh a kido dingin hong pai-in Merom lui-ah giahphual a sat khawm uh hi

Tua ciangin Topa in Joshua kiangah, “Zing ciang tubang hunin amaute khempeuh a kithatsa-in Israel mite tungah pia ding ka hih manin amaute kihta kei un. A sakolte uh a zagui na sattat ding uh a, a leengte uh mei tawh na hal ding uh hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Joshua zong a galkapte khempeuh tawh thakhat thu-in Merom lui gei amaute kiangah pai-in va sim uh hi

Topa in Israel-te' khutsungah amaute pia a, amaute in vatgawpin a Lian Sidon leh Misrefothmaim ciangdong, leh nisuahna lamah Mizpeh kuam ciangdong delh uh a, amaute kuamah a om nawnlo dongin a vatgawp uh hi
Topa' sawl bangin Joshua in amaute hih a, amau' sakolte uh a zagui sattat sakin mei tawh a leengte uh a halsak hi
Tua hun laitakin Joshua kihei kikin Hazor la a, namsau tawh a kumpipa a that hi. (Tua hun laitakin Hazor khua pen tua kumpipa gam khempeuh sungah a thahat pen ahi hi
Amaute in tua sunga om mi khempeuh namsau tawh that khinmang uh hi. Khat zong hingkhawi lo uh a, a khuapi uh zong a haltum uh hi
Topa' nasem Moses in a thupiaksa bangin Joshua in tua kumpite' khuapite, leh a kumpi khempeuh la-in namsau tawh amaute vatin thatmang khin hi
Ahih hangin Hazor khua longal mualtunga om khuapite khat zong Israel mite in hallo uh a, Joshua in tua khua bek a hal hi
Israel mite in tua khuapite sunga van kinusiate leh ganhingte amau' galzawh van dingin a la uh hi. Ahih hangin amaute a thah khit matengun namsau tawh vatgawp uh a, khat beek hingkhawi lo uh hi
Topa in ama nasem Moses a thupiak bangin Moses in zong Joshua thu pia a, Joshua zong tua bangmahin gamta a, Topa in Moses a thupiaknate khempeuh a hihloh omlo hi.
Tua ahih ciangin Joshua in gam khempeuh, mualtung gam leh Negeb gam leh Goshen gam khempeuh leh lei niamna gam leh Arabah leh Israel-te' mualtung gam leh a lei niamna gamte
Seir lamah a kikhungto Halak Mual panin Hermon Mual nuai Lebanon kuama om Baalgad ciangdong a la hi. Amah in amau' kumpite khempeuh la-in amaute vatgawpin a that hi
Hih kumpite khempeuh leh Joshua sauveipi sung a kido hi
Gibeon khua-a teng Hiv mite longal, Israel mite tawh kilemna a bawl khuapi khat zong omlo hi. Amaute in tua khua dangte khempeuh simin a lak uh ahi hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in Moses a thupiakna bangin amaute a kisuksiat mangna ding leh hehpihna ngahloin a kibeisak theihna dingin Israel-te a dona dingin a lungsim uh a khauhsakpa pen Topa ahi hi

Tua hun laitakin Joshua hong pai-in mualtung gam, Hebron, Debir, Anab, leh Judah mualtung gam khempeuh, leh Israel mualtung gam khempeuh panin Anak mite nawhkhia siang a, Joshua in a khuapite uh tawh amaute susiamang khawm hi
Israel mite' leitangah Anak mite khat zong om nawnlo a, Gaza, Gath, leh Ashdod sung bekah pawlkhat omlai hi

Topa in Moses tungah a gensa bangin Joshua in leitang khempeuh a la hi. Tua ciangin Joshua in amau minam tawh kizui-in a ngah ding bangin Israel mite tungah gamh-in a pia hi. Tua huna kipan galdona panin tua gam a tawlnga hi.
